{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032208003239AAB836DE05695F7FA2"}"},"total":434},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7225148163299459840","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"挺搞笑的，有一种星式无厘头幽默，我超爱。另外，作者大大，我可以应聘配角吗。林梦云～可男可女可人妖，可开朗可活泼可阴暗，只要能让我演戏，做什么都行[奸笑][奸笑][奸笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1682235959,"group_id":"7107488368379825160","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N0Z2VW4T+raaK/2c1PN/AWRMrCmp145YPZtisReg+z6k","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2787997031868830","user_name":"爱吃海椒炒肉的林梦云"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2787997031868830","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7107488368379825160","book_info":{"abstract":"简介：《爆笑＋不恐怖＋无女主+反套路＋爽文+玩梗》
突遭女盆友爆炸穿越平行世界的林默，因为和他人讲了一点道理而被抓进青山精神病院。
出院前夕意外进入神秘的恐怖游戏之中。
在外面的你就算在强也是虚拟的，想要在游戏里活下去只能靠逆天运气以及真正的实力！
不过林默表示，我出来混靠的是不要脸、无间道外加人情世故！
面对游戏里出现的霸凌。
林默：“身为新时代的三好青年，面对校园霸凌我等义不容辞！
不过我们要先讲讲道理！”
“我举报，林默他说讲道理上来就给了我几刀！我大意了没有闪……”
“为什么你能和怪物称兄道弟？”
“怎么总有怪物爱上你！”
游戏鬼怪千千万，林默混子惹一半！
我就是我，是不一样的烟火！
还有我真的不是替身使者！那其实是我的女盆友！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/9404b9a231bfacb1bdd9eb05512f553e~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"摸鱼不积极","author_id":"","book_id":"7107488368379825160","book_name":"谁让这个老六，参加恐怖游戏的！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282030","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2158人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":539,"name":"悬疑脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=539&name=悬疑脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7107576561418633741","read_count":"2158","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1327576"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"647","tags":"悬疑脑洞,穿越,诸天万界,灵异,无女主,架空,悬疑","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/72ebd0c08a93be090d78407e09f933f7~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779321632&x-signature=FzKVoLh91EVC1feJTUFtUPaF1O4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2639269266208365","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"2.917696e+06"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032208003239AAB836DE05695F
